iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 13:00 — FALLING STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Kharg Island strikes target military/oil assets, not nuclear infrastructure. US holding Kharg oil infrastructure 'hostage' to force Hormuz reopening — economic leverage, not nuclear escalation. Nuclear track continues de-escalation despite conventional escalation. Mojtaba Khamenei leadership instability a wildcard but no nuclear signals triggered. Trump rejects Putin proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia. 14% (no change).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 14:00 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) FUJAIRAH OIL TERMINAL STRUCK: Iranian drones hit UAE's Fujairah port — one of world's largest oil storage/bunkering hubs OUTSIDE Hormuz. All oil loading suspended (Bloomberg/Reuters). Iran closing bypass routes around Hormuz blockade. (2) US EMBASSY BAGHDAD HIT FOR 2ND TIME: Missile struck helipad inside compound, smoke rising (AP/Al Jazeera/NYT). (3) New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei's first official message: vows to keep Hormuz closed, continue attacking US bases (Guardian). (4) Tehran readies 'more destructive' missiles. (5) 2,500 Marines + assault ships en route. (6) 500+ tankers still trapped, Brent above $100. (7) Kharg Island strikes continue. All bypass routes now under attack — Fujairah, Oman ports. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 13:00 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) Axios/JPost: Israel planning MASSIVE ground invasion — seize entire area south of Litani River. 'Largest since 2006.' (2) Israeli strike on primary healthcare center in southern Lebanon killed 12 medical personnel (The Hindu). (3) 634+ killed in Lebanon (Guardian), 800K-1M displaced. (4) Hezbollah Radwan forces raiding northern Israel. 210+ rockets since March 2. (5) Israel strikes Beirut, kills Hamas official in south Beirut. (6) Entire families 'wiped out' — Guardian detailed report. (7) Israel agreed to spare Beirut airport but NOT other infrastructure. Capped at 100.

turkey.notes: IMMINENT RISING. Third intercept confirmed March 13 — NATO spokesperson Allison Hart: 'NATO remains vigilant and stands firm in its defence of all allies.' Sirens in Adana near Incirlik. Turkey formally asked Tehran to clarify. Iran denies targeting. Politico EU: one more intercept triggers Article 4 consultations. Multiple sources (NYT, Reuters, Bloomberg, Politico, France24) confirmed. 59 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 65. ONE intercept from Article 4 consultations. Zone now IMMINENT (60-100 range).

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India strongly condemned Pakistan airstrikes on Afghanistan, supporting Afghan sovereignty (MEA spokesperson Jaiswal). India highlighted civilian casualties including women and children during Ramadan. No military escalation signals. Qatar mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) TRUMP TEMPORARILY LIFTS RUSSIA OIL SANCTIONS amid Hormuz crisis — Europe furious. German Chancellor: 'decision is wrong, pressure on Putin should be increased.' Major economic lifeline for Russia. (2) Trump rejects Putin's proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia — Moscow's diplomatic overreach rebuffed. (3) ISW: Oil shock invalidates Russian economic pressure assumptions. (4) Russia condemns Bryansk strike as 'terrorist attack,' accuses Britain. (5) 1,278,430 total casualties, 810 killed/wounded last 24h. (6) Russia expanding drone production to 19,000/day, USF to 101,000 by April 1. 30 + 8 (sanctions waiver) + 4 (Iran coupling) = 42.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China warplane flights near Taiwan plunged from 92 to 7 over two weeks — sharpest drop in years. US THAAD fully relocated from South Korea. China appears to be exercising strategic patience while US overextends in ME. US Navy ships redeploying from Nagasaki Japan to Middle East — Indo-Pacific gap widening. $14B Taiwan arms deal awaits Trump approval ahead of Xi summit March 31. No new signals. 12 + 6 (THAAD) - 3 (reduced flights) = 15.

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING — MAJOR ESCALATION. (1) North Korea fired 10+ ballistic missiles in salvo Saturday morning March 14 — coordinated barrage from Sunan area near Pyongyang. Japan confirms ~340km range into Sea of Japan outside EEZ. (2) Timed during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' drills — direct provocation. (3) Third provocation this week. South Korea JCS calls it 'unprecedented pace.' (4) Launches reject Trump's dialogue outreach. (5) Bloomberg: 'more than 10' missiles — Reuters/Al Jazeera/Nikkei/Japan Times all confirm. Multiple independent confirmations. 8 + 12 (missile test) + 10 (salvo) + 5 (rhetoric) + 6 (China coupling) = 41.

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) Trump temporarily lifts Russia oil sanctions — major economic lifeline, war economy benefits further from $100+ oil. Europe condemns move. (2) Zelenskyy: ME war 'bad news for Ukraine' — drawing attention and anti-aircraft missiles away. (3) Zelenskyy met Iran Shah's son in Paris, urged no Iran-Russia cooperation. (4) Russian strikes kill 4 near Kyiv, wound 15. (5) Russia expanding drone output to 19,000/day, USF to 101,000 by April 1. (6) Polymarket: ceasefire by end March at 2% — effectively dead. (7) 810 Russian casualties last 24h, 1,278,430 total. 35 + 5 (Russia critical) + 5 (Turkey critical) + 5 (sanctions benefit) = 50.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — ESCALATION CONTINUES. (1) Pakistan PAF struck 51 locations in eastern Afghanistan, hit Kam Air fuel depot in Kandahar. 6 civilian deaths in latest Kabul strikes (Reuters/LA Times). (2) Afghanistan claims drone strike on Pakistan's 'Hamza' military center in Islamabad — if confirmed, unprecedented escalation hitting a capital city. Pakistan denies, says drones intercepted (India Today). (3) President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on civilian targets. (4) Afghan drones injured 4 Pakistani civilians including 2 children. (5) Both sides claim strikes on other's territory. (6) UNAMA condemned civilian casualties. (7) Pakistan calls it 'open war.' (8) Nuclear-armed state in open war remains extreme escalation risk. 10 + 10 + 8 + 7 + 5 + 15 + 2 + 8 = 78 → 81.

top_signals: FUJAIRAH OIL TERMINAL STRUCK — Iranian drones hit UAE's Fujairah port, one of world's largest oil storage hubs OUTSIDE Hormuz. All loading suspended. Iran closing bypass routes around blockade (Bloomberg/Reuters)
US EMBASSY BAGHDAD HIT FOR 2ND TIME — Missile struck helipad inside compound, smoke rising. Escalation of proxy attacks on US diplomatic facilities (AP/Al Jazeera)
US STRIKES KHARG ISLAND — Iran's oil export hub (90% of exports). CENTCOM released strike video. Trump threatens oil infrastructure next (NYT/CNN/AP)
5 KC-135 REFUELING PLANES DAMAGED — Iranian missile strike on Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia. First Iranian strike destroying US aircraft on Gulf state soil (WSJ/Reuters)
NORTH KOREA FIRES 10+ BALLISTIC MISSILES in salvo during US-South Korea drills — THIRD provocation this week. 'Unprecedented pace' (Reuters/Bloomberg)
NEW IRANIAN SUPREME LEADER vows to keep Hormuz closed, continue US base attacks — first official message from Mojtaba Khamenei (Guardian)
ISRAEL PLANNING MASSIVE GROUND INVASION of southern Lebanon — seize area south of Litani. 'Largest since 2006' (Axios/ToI)
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: PAF strikes 51 locations. Kam Air fuel depot hit in Kandahar. Third week of open war (Reuters/Al Jazeera)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: NO DE-ESCALATION. Day 15 14:00 SCAN. Global war probability IMMINENT. SIX trackers at IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (81), Turkey (65→71 with coupling). NEW ESCALATION: (1) Fujairah oil terminal hit — Iran now attacking ALL bypass routes around Hormuz (Oman ports + UAE hub). (2) US Embassy Baghdad struck for 2nd time — proxy escalation. (3) New Supreme Leader vows continuation. NO de-escalation signals in any theater. US military overextension across 4+ active fronts deepening.

latest_news.headline: Fujairah oil terminal struck by Iranian drones — all loading suspended
latest_news.text: Iranian drones struck UAE's Fujairah oil terminal — one of the world's largest oil storage and bunkering hubs, located OUTSIDE the Strait of Hormuz. All oil loading operations suspended after fire. Iran now systematically closing bypass routes around Hormuz blockade (Oman ports struck earlier, now Fujairah).

latest_news.headline: US Embassy Baghdad hit for SECOND time — missile strikes helipad inside compound
latest_news.text: A missile struck the helipad inside the US Embassy compound in Baghdad — second strike since war began. Smoke seen rising from the building. Escalation of proxy attacks on US diplomatic facilities.

latest_news.headline: 5 US KC-135 refueling planes damaged in Iranian missile strike on Saudi air base
latest_news.text: Five US Air Force KC-135 refueling planes were struck and damaged on the ground at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia during an Iranian missile strike. Wall Street Journal first reported, citing two US officials. This marks the first direct Iranian strike destroying US military aircraft on Gulf state soil.

latest_news.headline: CENTCOM destroys 30+ Iranian minelaying ships, mine warehouses
latest_news.text: CENTCOM announced destruction of over 30 Iranian minelaying ships and targeted naval mine warehouses and manufacturing facilities across Iran. Accelerating mine-clearing operations to reopen Strait of Hormuz shipping lanes.

latest_news.headline: New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei vows to keep Hormuz closed, continue attacks
latest_news.text: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei issued first official message: vowed to keep Strait of Hormuz blocked and continue attacking US bases in the region. Questions about his health and whereabouts persist. Succession confirmed March 9 after father's assassination Feb 28.

latest_news.headline: North Korea fires 10+ ballistic missiles in salvo during US-South Korea drills
latest_news.text: North Korea fired more than 10 ballistic missiles from Sunan area near Pyongyang Saturday morning during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' drills. Japan confirms ~340km range into Sea of Japan outside EEZ. Third provocation this week. South Korea JCS: 'unprecedented pace of provocations.'

latest_news.headline: Israel planning massive ground invasion of southern Lebanon — seize area south of Litani
latest_news.text: Israel planning to significantly expand ground operation in Lebanon, aiming to seize entire area south of Litani River and dismantle Hezbollah military infrastructure. Described as 'largest since 2006.' 634+ killed, 800K-1M displaced.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan: PAF strikes 51 locations, Kam Air fuel depot hit in Kandahar
latest_news.text: Pakistan Air Force struck 51 locations in eastern Afghanistan, hit Kam Air fuel depot in Kandahar. 6 civilian deaths in Kabul strikes. President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line.' Nuclear-armed state in open war enters third week.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability IMMINENT (Day 15 14:00). SIX trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (81), Turkey (65, imminent after coupling). FOUR trackers critical (Russia 50, Russia-Ukraine 55, DPRK 41). NEW DEVELOPMENTS: (1) Fujairah oil terminal hit by Iranian drones — all loading suspended. Iran now attacking ALL bypass routes (Oman + UAE). (2) US Embassy Baghdad struck for 2nd time — proxy escalation. (3) New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei's first message vows Hormuz closure continuation. WATCH: (a) Kharg oil infrastructure — point of no return. (b) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4. (c) Lebanon ground invasion timing. (d) DPRK nuclear test risk. (e) US overextension across 4+ fronts. (f) Fujairah fire — potential broader Gulf infrastructure campaign. (g) Iran 'more destructive' missiles threatened.
